title: Tube Radius Calculation
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"349uq","text":"Materials:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":10}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"29h53","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9u9ev","text":"Image stack of multichannel confocal fluorescence images ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"44v00","text":"Pressure data over time for GUV aspiration pipette","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8kn1u","text":"Force data over time for bead held in optical trap ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4aq9","text":"FIJI","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a7cck","text":"Image segmentation and quantification script (Python)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8u3n2","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Measure the radius of the GUV and of the aspiration pipette from imaging data.
In FIJI, create new image stacks from two rectangular selections: one containing a section of the membrane tube, and one containing the approximately horizontal section of the guv.
Save these new stacks as .tif files and paste paths into segmentation and quantification script.
Use the output of the segmentation and quantification script to calculate the ratio of fluorescence intensity of the membrane tube and the GUV surface (I tub / I GUV ).
Plot tube radius as calculated in step 2 vs. the fluorescence ratio calculated in step 5. Perform a linear fit of the data, recording the slope, K tub , for use in subsequent experiments.
In FIJI, create new image stacks from two rectangular selections: one containing a section of the membrane tube, and one containing the approximately horizontal section of the guv.
Save these new stacks as .tif files and paste paths into segmentation and quantification script.
Input K tub as a parameter in the quantification function to normalize fluorescence ratio to tube radius.
creator: Liv Jensen
